nasb.text: Therefore the Lord has kept the calamity in store and brought it on us; for the Lord our God is righteous with respect to all His deeds which He has done, but we have not obeyed His voice.

esv.text: Therefore the Lord has kept ready the calamity and has brought it upon us, for the Lord our God is righteous in all the works that he has done, and we have not obeyed his voice.

cnv.text: 所以耶和華留意使這災禍臨到我們身上，因為耶和華我們的　神在他所行的一切事上都是公義的，我們卻沒有聽從他的話。

ccb.text: 所以耶和华决意使灾祸降在我们身上，因为我们的上帝耶和华的一切作为都是公义的，我们却没有听从祂的话。
